nasb.text: And so, by sinning against the brethren and wounding their conscience when it is weak, you sin against Christ.

esv.text: Thus, sinning against your brothers and wounding their conscience when it is weak, you sin against Christ.

cnv.text: 你們這樣得罪弟兄，傷了他們軟弱的良心，就是得罪基督了。

ccb.text: 你们这样得罪弟兄，伤了他脆弱的良心，就是得罪基督。

csbs.text: 当你们这样对弟兄犯罪，打击他们软弱良心的时候，就是对基督犯罪。
